name: cache-warden
description: Keep Claude Code and opt-in Codex prompt caches warm with bounded per-session pings
author: Efs-O

cacheWarden.ttlSeconds.description: Seconds of idle before firing a keepalive ping (default 4:40, 20s before the 5-min TTL)

cacheWarden.keepAliveDurationSeconds.description: Stop pinging after this many seconds of total idle (default 30 min)

cacheWarden.keepAliveMaxPings.description: Maximum consecutive keepalive pings per idle session (~28 min coverage at 4-min intervals)

cacheWarden.targets.description: Which assistant providers to watch. Codex automatic keep-alive also requires the cacheWarden.codexKeepAlive opt-in.

cacheWarden.hookEnabled.description: Install the Claude Code Stop hook that automatically fires keepalive pings

cacheWarden.pingMethod.description: How CacheWarden prepares keepalive pings for the current chat sidebar

cacheWarden.showStatusBar.description: Show the cache countdown in the status bar

cacheWarden.claudePath.description: Absolute path to the Claude Code executable (the package's native binary, e.g. .../@anthropic-ai/claude-code/bin/claude.exe). Leave empty to auto-detect.

cacheWarden.codexPath.description: Absolute path to the Codex executable. Leave empty to auto-detect npm and OpenAI VS Code extension installations or use PATH.

cacheWarden.codexKeepAlive.description: Enable Codex keep-alive: guarded per-session countdowns, manual pings, and automatic keep-alive. Off by default. Note: Codex keep-alive fires real Codex turns that consume your Codex usage.

scripts.test:codex: esbuild src/ClaudeTitleParser.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=.test-dist/ClaudeTitleParser.cjs && esbuild src/CodexJsonlParser.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=.test-dist/CodexJsonlParser.cjs && esbuild src/CodexSessionTracker.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=.test-dist/CodexSessionTracker.cjs && esbuild src/CodexKeepAliveRunner.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=.test-dist/CodexKeepAliveRunner.cjs && node --test tests/ClaudeTitleParser.test.cjs tests/CodexJsonlParser.test.cjs tests/CodexSessionTracker.test.cjs tests/CodexKeepAliveRunner.test.cjs
